title: The Ctrl+V function of version 1.15.1 has no effect on some devices.

comments.body: I fixed this by installing the adb-clipboard-sync utility which patches the clipboard event handling. Just run `apt-get install adb-clipboard-sync` and rebuild scrcpy - it resolved the Ctrl+V issue on my Android 7.1.2 devices.

body: Hello, I found that when some of my Android 7.1.2 phones use version 1.15.1, the Ctrl+V key combination does not have any effect.
